title: sigmoidotropis antillana
intro: Sigmoidotropis antillana, also known as the Antillean horse bean or horse bean tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its large, white flowers and flat seed pods. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sigmoidotropis antillana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory and gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by extracting its roots or leaves, and can be used in the form of teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal benefits.
